examples: Two of the fireworks in the box were duds.
How else do you explain people who are foreclosed on but wear designer duds?
Their fashionable (and usually dark) duds show off just the right amount of chest.
So what in the world would compel them to spend so much money on designer duds?
Boston-based quant shop, ClearStream Investments, says the top four BRIC exchange traded funds are duds short-term.
